markdown:
Table of optimizer hyperparameters quoted verbatim from §5.3 of *Attention Is All You Need*: Adam; β₁ = 0.9; β₂ = 0.98; ε = 1e-9, with the warning that β₂ and ε intentionally differ from generic Adam defaults, plus verbatim source citation [1] and adjacent schedule parameters warmup_steps = 4000 with warmup-linear then inverse-square-root decay [2]. Reproducer guardrails note that library Adam defaults must not be used.

Sources
[1] Attention Is All You Need, 5.3 Optimizer, p. 7
[2] Attention Is All You Need, 5.3 Optimizer, p. 7
